When using Directus Flows with the WebHook trigger all incoming request details are logged including security sensitive data like access and refresh tokens in cookies.

### Impact

Malicious admins with access to the logs can hijack the user sessions within the token expiration time of them triggering the Flow.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-f24x-rm6g-3w5v", "html_url": "https://github.com/directus/directus/security/advisories/GHSA-f24x-rm6g-3w5v", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-f24x-rm6g-3w5v"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2025-53886"}], "private_fork": null, "published_at": "2025-07-14T16:12:20Z", "publisher": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/9389634?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/br41nslug/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/br41nslug/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/br41nslug/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/br41nslug/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/br41nslug", "id": 9389634, "login": "br41nslug", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjkzODk2MzQ=", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/br41nslug/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/br41nslug/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/br41nslug/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/br41nslug/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/br41nslug/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/br41nslug", "user_view_type": "public"}, "severity": "medium", "state": "published", "submission": null, "summary": "Tokens are not redacted in Flow logs", "updated_at": "2026-06-05T15:38:46Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/repos/directus/directus/security-advisories/GHSA-f24x-rm6g-3w5v", "vulnerabilities": [{"package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "directus"}, "patched_versions": "11.9.0", "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">=9.0.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Tokens are not redacted in Flow logs
